description: Drug & Alcohol Program Manager — DOT/FAA testing program management, random selection pools, MRO coordination, and annual reporting

hard_stops.label: Positive Test Not Actioned
hard_stops.logic: Positive drug or alcohol test result without removal from safety-sensitive duties

hard_stops.label: Random Testing Rate Below FAA Minimum
hard_stops.logic: Random selection pool rate below FAA minimum — 25% for drugs, 10% for alcohol

hard_stops.label: Test Not Conducted Within Required Window
hard_stops.logic: Selected employee not tested within the required timeframe after random selection or reasonable cause determination

soft_flags.label: Random Selection Due
soft_flags.logic: Next random selection draw is due based on testing schedule

soft_flags.label: Annual Report Filing Deadline Approaching
soft_flags.logic: FAA annual MIS report filing deadline is within 30 days

soft_flags.label: MRO Response Pending
soft_flags.logic: Medical Review Officer has not provided final determination on a pending test result

soft_flags.label: Employee Return-to-Duty Pending
soft_flags.logic: Employee in return-to-duty process has pending SAP evaluation or follow-up testing
